testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
20:18:52.305 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.report.ApplicationTests]: ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:18:52.841 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.report.Application for test class com.report.ApplicationTests 20:18:53.597 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
